description: Codat provides APIs and tools that let financial institutions and software platforms access, standardize, and sync small-business accounting, banking, commerce, and expense data. Its products also support workflows such as bank feeds, lending-related insights, and data synchronization into accounting systems.
summary: Codat exposes seven authenticated HTTP APIs on https://api.codat.io for accounting, assess, bank feeds, banking, commerce, sync for commerce, and sync for expenses; all documented as using a Codat API key sent as a Basic Authorization header. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
